plot.description: Input plot to annotate genomic region zoom lines from

chrom.description: Chromosome of region to draw zoom lines from, as a string

chromstart.description: Integer start position on chromosome to draw zoom lines from

chromend.description: Integer end position on chromosome to draw zoom lines from

y0.description: A numeric vector or unit object indicating the starting y-values of the zoom line segments

x1.description: A numeric vector or unit object indicating the stopping x-values of the zoom line segments

y1.description: A numeric vector or unit object indicating the stopping y-values of the zoom line segments

extend.description: A numeric vector or unit object indicating the length to extend straight lines from each end of the zoom line segments

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if y0, x1, y1, or extend are only given as numerics or numeric vectors

linecolor.description: A character value specifying zoom line color

lty.description: A numeric specifying zoom line type

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
